verses.1: I love the LORD, because he listens to my voice,
verses.2: Because he has turned his ear to me,
verses.3: The cords of death surrounded me,
verses.4: Then I called on the LORD’s name:
verses.5: The LORD is gracious and righteous.
verses.7: Return to your rest, my soul,
verses.8: For you have delivered my soul from death,
verses.9: I will walk before the LORD in the land of the living.
verses.12: What will I give to the LORD for all his benefits toward me?
verses.13: I will take the cup of salvation, and call on the LORD’s name.
verses.14: I will pay my vows to the LORD,
verses.15: Precious in the LORD’s sight is the death of his saints.
verses.16: LORD, truly I am your servant.
verses.17: I will offer to you the sacrifice of thanksgiving,
verses.18: I will pay my vows to the LORD,
verses.19: in the courts of the LORD’s house,
